case_title: MILTON KATZ VS. VHW HOLDINGS, LTD et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY KATZ, MILTON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATZ, MILTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VHW HOLDINGS, LTD WONG, VICTOR $2,999.00 PRINCIPAL, $169.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,168.00, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO APPEAR. DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, VICTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,999.00 FILED BY KATZ, MILTON AS TO DEFENDANT VHW HOLDINGS, LTD WONG, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
